A WATERSPOUT CAME ASHORE WEST OF TERRA CEIA, ALONG THE NORTHWESTWARD JUTTING PENINSULA THAT ATTACHES THE SKYWAY BRIDGE TO THE MAINLAND. THE TORNADO THEN TRAVELED SOUTHEASTWARD FOR JUST UNDER A MILE BEFORE MOVING BACK OVER WATER. AN 18 WHEELER WAS DAMAGED, AND OTHER MINOR DAMAGE OCCURRED TO TREES AND ROAD SIGNS. THE TORNADO HAS BEEN ASSIGNED A PRELIMINARY RATING OF EF-0 WITH MAXIMUM WIND SPEEDS OF 65 TO 75 MPH.
